content.html: In a previous article, I mentioned that I have to use mongo-express to import and export data from my local server, which causes some trouble. When I export from my local, it has a date value import. The button is not working.

content.alt: Export and Import Button in mongo-express
content.caption: Export and Import Button in mongo-express

content.html: After I pressed the export button, it made a JSON file like the below example.
But when imported into the server mongo-express, it doesn’t work. After many struggles with JSON files and server, I discovered the problem is related to the $date format.
So I tried different types of JSON made with Nosqlbooster and imported with the New Document button.

content.alt: Struggle with export and import in MongoDB via mongo-express
